burst.msg_body: Could not burst due to multiple potential reads to the same bundle in the same region.

Multiple burst reads of length 1024 and bit width 256 in loop 'LOAD_ROW0' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem_in'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
